issues.detail: The skill does not handle missing or incomplete user inputs and lacks error handling for edge cases.

scenarios.name: Senior software engineer offer letter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits every required section from the template — Position Details, Compensation with 4-year vest plus 1-year cliff (25% then monthly), Benefits, Contingencies, explicit at-will clause, Next Steps with expiration date, and signature/acceptance block — and reminds the user to have legal/HR review; baseline omits the contingencies and at-will sections and gives no acceptance/expiration deadline.

scenarios.name: Revised offer after candidate counter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented revision workflow: opens by acknowledging the revision, updates base to $185K, adds $15K signing bonus with clawback terms and 30-day payment, preserves expiration, and saves as a new file leaving the original intact; baseline simply rewrites numbers without clawback, revision acknowledgement, or file-preservation guidance.
